description: acmedns.googleapis.com is Google's ACME DNS service endpoint used to manage DNS-01 challenge TXT records for domains previously managed through Google Domains. Public product documentation is minimal now because Google Domains was migrated to Squarespace, but the API discovery documents still describe the service.
summary: acmedns.googleapis.com exposes one REST API, the Google Domains ACME DNS API, for reading and rotating ACME DNS-01 challenge records; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
